metadata.title: SYNGO_BP_5090
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Figure 1: as demonstrated by reverse-IP and mutated-domain-controls in the crude membrane fraction prepared from the mouse brains; s-afadin (AFDN) interacts with MAGUIN-1 (CNKSR2, long isoform) and MAGUIN-2 (CNKSR2, shorter isoform that lacks the C-terminal 137 amino acids).

Figure 2, 4: s-afadin (specifically its RA domains) and MAGUIN-1 are required for the localization of PSD-95 (DLG4) in the cultured hippocampal neurons. Further, loss of MAGUIN-1 impaired cell surface localization of the AMPA receptors (Fig. 6).. Experimental description: Figure 2 uses overexpression of EGFP constructs; we annotate against the species of the overexpressed protein.

constructs:
"The mammalian expression plasmids for EGFP-tagged rat l-afadin, EGFP-tagged rat s-afadin, and bacterial expression plasmid for GST-rat afadin NN (aa 2-500) were described previously (21). The cDNA coding mouse MAGUIN-1 (clone ID: 6405389) was obtained from the I.M.A.G.E. consortium. The expression plasmid for an EGFP-tagged s-afadin mutant lacking the RA domains (aa 350-1663), V5-tagged plasmids for full-length MAGUIN-1, full-length MAGUIN-2, MAGUIN-2-N (aa 1-572) and MAGUIN-2-C (aa 567-896) were constructed using PCR-based standard molecular biology techniques."

note; the mouse MAGUIN-1 clone refers to GenBank ID BC043093
